expectations.evidence: Naive Claude has no instruction to launch parallel sub-agents. Without the skill, Claude would read the specs and write a single summary response inline — no Task agents spawned, no parallelism.

expectations.text: Each analyzes specs from their perspective
expectations.evidence: Without the skill's persona cards (hydra/personas/*.md) and per-agent prompt template, Claude has no mechanism to analyse the specs through 8 distinct persona lenses. It would produce a single generic summary at best.
Naive Claude might note some missing features in general but would not attribute them to specific personas with in-character rationale or the structured table format the skill requires.
Naive Claude would not know to write output to '{PROJECT}/openspec/feature-counsel-report.md'. It would print findings to chat rather than persisting a structured markdown file at the canonical path.

notes: Without the skill, Claude defaults to a single-agent inline text response. No sub-agents are launched, no persona cards are consulted, no report file is written. All four expectations fail.
